question_sentence: Which country did the US and Israel launch military strikes against this week?
evidence: The US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, targeting nuclear and military sites and the country’s late supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

question_sentence: A total lunar eclipse turned the moon a deep red on Tuesday in some parts of the world. What is the event called?
evidence: A total lunar eclipse, or blood moon, illuminated parts of the sky this week across Asia, Australia, the Pacific and the Americas.

question_sentence: The US military is now conducting anti-drug trafficking operations with which country?
evidence: The US military is conducting anti-drug trafficking operations with Ecuador targeting “designated terrorist organizations” in the Latin American country, the Pentagon announced Tuesday.

question_sentence: Artificial intelligence data centers are using huge amounts of which resource?
evidence: President Donald Trump unveiled a voluntary pledge with major tech companies on Wednesday that the administration said will protect consumers from rising electricity costs spurred by AI development.

question_sentence: GLP-1 drugs, widely used for weight loss, may also help treat which condition?
evidence: Evidence is mounting that the popular weight loss drugs known as GLP-1s may also help treat addiction.

question_sentence: Which possible cosmic marvel did NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope recently detect?
choices: A planet made entirely of water
A galaxy dominated by dark matter
evidence: A galaxy made almost entirely of dark matter was spotted by Hubble about 300 million light-years from Earth. Astronomers say it could help explain one of the most elusive substances in the universe.

question_sentence: Who won the Democratic primary for US Senate in Texas this week?
evidence: Voters in three states headed to the polls on Tuesday for the first primary day of the 2026 midterm elections. In Texas — perhaps the most closely watched contest — state Rep. James Talarico defeated US Rep. Jasmine Crockett to win the Democratic primary for the state’s Senate race.

question_sentence: Professional athlete Chloe Kelly is getting her own Barbie doll for inspiring young girls around the world. Which sport does she play?
evidence: In honor of being named Barbie's Role Model of the Year, England soccer star Chloe Kelly will also get a Barbie made in her likeness.

question_sentence: Which event is President Trump expected to attend for the first time as president?
evidence: Trump said he will attend this year's White House Correspondents' Dinner for the first time as president, a notable reversal after previously boycotting the annual event.

question_sentence: Which of the following products is Apple launching this month?
evidence: Apple will soon offer a lower-priced version of the iPhone 17. The pared-back version will have a slightly smaller screen and one camera instead of two.
